case_title: BOGUE, NILA vs. GILL, BYRON ADRIAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGUE, NILA AS TO DEFENDANT GILL, BYRON ADRIAN LIMA, VICTOR MANUEL LOPEZ DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-17-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-16-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-27-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-17-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-17-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHOTOCOPY FOR 4 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 106621. DEFT COPY. FOR DEFENDANT GILL, BYRON ADRIAN

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), (PROOF OF SERVICE BY PUBLICATION IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE) HEARING SET FOR JAN-09-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS GRANTED, DEPT 2, JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGUE, NILA

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-09-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO PROOF OF SERVICE OR PUBLICATION ORDER. HEARING SET FOR FEB-14-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-14-1996, OFF CALENDAR
